entry.title: Taskipelago v0.8.2
entry.content:
# Taskipelago/Taskipelabingo v0.8.2 Just a quick bug fix patch to do with progression groupings
## Bug Fixes * Progression groupings fixed to allow multiple reward dependencies on same number of progressive items

entry.title: A Link Between Worlds v0.2.3
entry.content: This release reverts the patching changes from the previous version, which caused the patcher to fail on some systems.

entry.title: Rabi-Ribi v1.5.1
entry.content:
## Quick Links - [Game Info Page](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/blob/main/worlds/rabi_ribi/docs/en_Rabi-Ribi.md) - [Setup Guide](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/blob/main/worlds/rabi_ribi/docs/setup_beta_en.md) - [Known Issues](https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen%20label%3Abug)
## Before Playing This randomizer assumes the player is aware of hidden techniques that allow the game to be beaten without items, even at the lowest settings. It is HIGHLY recommended to play through the Basic section of the [Platforming Tricks Tutorial](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=1706422414) before starting your first seed!
Additionally, the logic assumes that the player knows of hidden paths throughout the game, revealed with Ribbon, Fire Orb, or Carrot Bombs. A patch is available to expose these paths, alongside other useful features! It can be enabled by setting "Apply Beginner Mod" to `true`.
## What's Changed * 1.5.0 Bug Fixes by @dclaganiere in https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/pull/90 * Update Eggs and Magic Types to be Deprioritized by @dclaganiere in https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/pull/91
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tdkollins/Archipelago-Rabi-Ribi/compare/1.5.0...1.5.1

entry.title: Okami HD v0.4.4
entry.content:
# Okami HD Apworld 0.4.4
## What's Changed * Mist and Mermaid Warps in Logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/58 * Rework Moon Cave Logic
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.4.3...0.4.4

entry.title: Factorio - Space Age Without Space v0.9.1
entry.content: ## 0.9.1 * Science Packs are now given randomised names. * Changed the 'Vanilla' yellow science pack to be crafted in a centrifuge, then added it to the machine shuffle. * Fixed a bug with Universal Tracker compatibility. * Made fruit trees immune to lightning strikes.

entry.title: Library of Ruina v1.0.0
entry.content:
As always, check known bugs and report bugs in #70
**Unsubscribe from workshop mod!**
**New run NOT required**
**Uses -delta .apworld**
## What changed since -alpha: ### In -beta: - FIXED: Custom books are now properly saved - FIXED: Now you can't put books into the invitation manually, and can't find receptions earlier that way - FIXED: Impossible Passive Attribution Points (Needs testing, but i'm 99% sure it's fixed now) - FIXED: Receptions are no longer visible after joining new session without closing the game - FIXED: It's not possible to open Black Silence and Distorted Ensemble before you reach those battles ### In -gamma: - CHANGED: Updated reception tree looks in the game. the reception box of doom. It's only for testing, so bear with me. - CHANGED & FIXED: Changed how run seeds work. Fixed stuff related to them (also thanks Yar) ### In -delta: - ADDED: Modified passive attribution system. Can now attribute up to 16 books. Passive Limits Break Item now works - FIXED: Impossible keypages and pages don't drop now (i hope)

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.8.3
entry.content:
# Taskipelago/Taskipelabingo v0.8.3
## Bug Fixes * Fixed reward item name display on server-side

entry.title: Minit v0.6.11
entry.content: Moves to rulebuilder meaning 0.6.7 is the newest minimum ap version fixes the client not inheriting ut commands

entry.title: Resident Evil 7 v0.3.4
entry.content: Test of SkipToChapter2 not creatings checks locations for chapter 1, can be broken, here be dragons !

entry.title: Pizza Tower v1.3.2
entry.content:
# Pizza Tower Archipelago v1.3.2 [Setup](https://github.com/unsafetyskizzers/Archipelago/blob/pizza_ap/worlds/pizza_tower/docs/setup_en.md) | [Mod Page](https://gamebanana.com/mods/598236)
Another patch for some minor issues
- Improved killing Snotty - Added some more exceptions to the enemy randomization - Fixed a crash that'd happen when you re-entered floor 5 after beating CTOP - Prevent toppin monsters from being able to jumpscare the player while they're in a taxi - Throw OptionError when attempting to generate a game with a Snotty goal while he's on floor 1 - Fixed S and P ranked chef tasks not receiving the correct rules - A couple other logic changes

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.10
entry.content:
Updated Cathay Tech Tree. Added new content from Bhashiva – Character Pack.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).

entry.title: PokePark v1.2.2
entry.content:
## What's Changed * 75 pokepark map support in ut by @Mekurushi in https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/pull/120 * increased glaceon requirement by @Mekurushi in https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/pull/121
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

entry.title: Mario Kart Double Dash v1.0.0.post2
entry.content:
Yet another release candidate for the upcoming 1.0.0 release. It seems that for every few bugs I fix I can't resist adding something new to the mix. **NOTE**: This is prerelease version, there might be bugs!
Known problems: incompatible gecko codes. A bit of an update on this: I might not fix this for the release, since the custom patch keeps growing and over time it gets harder and harder to find free space to put stuff. A lot of romhacks aren't compatible with cheat codes anyways, so it's not top priority for this one to be.
Rc3 client is not compatible with seeds generated with rc2 or rc1!
Download a new apworld and options template below and have a good one! If this is your first time playing MKDD AP, here's the [setup guide](docs/en_Setup.md) and [readme](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash).
## New Features * Add Option Groups * Make custom lap counts editable in Options Creator * Add location "Dry Dry Desert - Survive Sand Pit" (requires a star) * See [v1.0.0rc1](https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/releases/tag/v1.0.0rc1) for other things new for v1.0.0 ## Fixes * Require 100cc for certain shortcuts in logic * Bump required version in template yaml * Give star for shortcuts if no items enabled
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aXu-AP/archipelago-double-dash/compare/v1.0.0rc2...v1.0.0rc3

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.11.post2
entry.content:
Changeling should now be fully playable.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).

entry.title: TCG Card Shop Simulator v1.0.0rc3
entry.content:
AP World for v1.0.0
This is for testing only. generation problems and more beware. UT is now supported.
[AP Client](https://github.com/FyreDay/TCG-CardShop-Sim-APClient/releases/tag/v1.0.0-Pre3)
- Fixed No Formats - reduced sell achievement targets - Fixed UT Gen problem

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v85
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.3): - "alternates" for logic - other changes to logic: locations are removed if any required region is excluded, levels detected differently, gear licenses not required if the setting is off - integrate always on level - The Pre-Sequel initial integration - Tracker tab in Client if UT is intalled

entry.title: Sonic Adventure DX v1.2.1
entry.content:
## [v1.2.2 pre-release 2] - 2026-05-22
### Fixed:
- Fixed crash near the Hot Shelter entrance when playing as Amy or Big. - Fixed crash when exiting the Chao Garden using the pause menu.

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v5.0.0
entry.content:
I'm really sorry for making you all wait a full year for this. It's time at last! # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - **Changed Shopsanity and Cutscenesanity to be Options again.** - Added a Chatsanity Check for talking to Bethany in the Caves after it was proven that you could reach her. (@tomtherockstar) - Slightly changed the logic for some of the Catacombs Checks, since you need to pick up the Hyperball (and therefore have it) to continue past the Slasher. - **Added "Builderman" as an Item, and made him logically required for the Dream World onwards.** - Changed the Pain Shop Category to be called Bizville Pain Shop for better organization. - Changed the Meadows Worm Check to have the Category Meadows [3]. It had the standalone Category Meadows, which was a minor mistake. - Slightly tweaked the names of the Checks where the Blackrock Chef gives you Shark Fin Soups. - Made the Manor Basement BUX not require I Spy, since it's pretty out in the open. - Replaced all instances of `{canReachLocation()}` with `{CanReachLocation()}` for futureproofing. - Added a Check for the semi-hidden Orange found in Sacred Hollow Path [1]. (@Quakkerz) - **Added/Changed/Removed a bunch of content related to the Story Rewrite.** The following is just a small snippet (from the pre-releases and RCs) of the many changes made: - Several Chatsanity Checks have been removed due to changed criteria or NPC changes. - Moved the Loyal Knight Check to the Roadtown Region since they now appear there first. - Added Checks related to the new Cruel King DX fight. - Cruel King DX's fight logically expects you to be able to finish Chapter 4. - Added a new Option: Optional Bosses. - Currently, the Cruel King DX and Supreme Mosquito content are the only things toggled by this Option. - Added a Check for the Feel Fine Kyoko gives you. Talk to her twice to receive it. - Added the Bounce Tool as an Item, and made it logically required for the end of the Catacombs onwards. - Added a 4th Item to the Roadtown Item Shop. - Renamed the Ye Olde Inn Category to Roadtown Inn. - Added a Check for the Feel Fine Card in the Turitopulis Cards & Weapons Shop. - Added 5 more Mango Checks from the Mango Tree. - Removed a Check from the Spooky Fruit Stand Shop. - Renamed Spiked Zombie to Sharp Zombie. - Added a Check for the Hitmarker Card in Banished Knight's Shop. - Renamed the Resurrect in Witch's Shop to Snowball. - Removed a Check from the Fridge Raider Shop. - Added a Check for the First Aid Kit Kyoko gives you if you talk to her about the Venomshank. - If you want to see even more of what was changed since the last release, including all of the Chapter 4 additions, feel free to [check out the comparison](https://github.com/WolfBoi008/Block-Tales/compare/4.2.3...5.0.0)! It's a lot... - **Added most content from Chapter 4.** - Read below for details on what's still missing.
# What's Missing? - Chapter 5 (obviously; read below) - Chatsanity for most of Chapter 4 - Check for the Pirate Spirit Enemy Trotter summons in his battle - Cutscenesanity (and some additional Checks) related to Cruel King DX - Levelsanity for Chapter 4 + a possible revamp to Levelsanity logic in general - Checks related to Finn McCool - I have yet to beat him myself yet, and he's not even available until you finish Chapter 4 anyway, so yeah...) - Anything else I may not be thinking of...?
# A Kinda Sappy Message I said it before, but I need to say it again: I really appreciate your patience waiting for this update to drop. I felt really guilty making you all wait until Demo 5's Story Rewrite before releasing this update. Once I'm done playing Chapter 5 with my friend group and I play it again solo, I'll begin development on its inclusion. Until then, please be patient for just a little longer! Thank you all for supporting this Manual as much as you have, as it means the world to me to see something I took the time and effort to do be supported this much. I struggle a lot with being confident and proud of myself, so seeing you all compliment this Manual, even if I don't admit it, and it sometimes feels like it isn't a lot in my eyes, makes my day a **lot** brighter! # Thank you! ❤️

entry.title: Crash2 v0.3.0
entry.content:
## Death Link - Option to enable sending/receiving death links - When one person with death link dies, everyone with death link dies
### Note Since this is a pre-release, I am leaving in some debug commands (to be used RESPONSIBLY) if you want to test some things out yourself. You will type these in the client: - debug_openwarproom - Fully opens the warp room and all secret entrances (**and sends checks**) - exec - Simulates receiving a death link (if death link ever fails or crashes the game, then please report the bug with a description of what you were doing in game and the printed crash state # from the console) - exec \<event id\> [event parameter 1] [event parameter 2] ... - For if you want to experiment with the game's internal event system. This will send an event of id \<event id\> to crash, and you can optionally pass some parameters along with the event - This is VERY prone to crashing the game - Make sure you use save states taken from **after** you connected with this version of the client
### Known Issues: - The client seems to have a small chance to freeze the game on connection (just try again and it'll be fine)

entry.title: Dark Cloud 1 v0.5.0
entry.content:
# Dark Cloud 1 AP Rando v0.5.2
## Changes - Fixed more item duplication bugs on the client
No changes to server; should work for existing saves and worlds.

entry.title: Laika: Aged Through Blood v0.1.0
entry.content: # Laika: Aged Through Blood Archipelago v1.2 Update Notes The wasteland has grown a little stranger, a little cleaner, and a lot more connected. This update is a major support, polish, and stability pass for the Laika Archipelago randomizer. It adds Universal Tracker support, improves item and quest logic, cleans up the client, and fixes several edge cases that could make the road rougher than intended. # Universal Tracker Support! Universal Tracker support is now included. Players can now use Universal Tracker to view Laika’s world map, see randomized check locations, and follow their current area as they travel across the wasteland. The tracker includes maps for all major regions, including Where We Live, Where Birds Lurk, Where All Was Lost, The Big Tree, Floating City, and more. The tracker now updates based on the player’s current in-game region. The opening tutorial route is also handled separately, so the tracker should stay on the tutorial map at the start of the game and then switch to normal areas after Rage and Sorrow. Universal Tracker’s `/explain` command is also supported for Laika locations, giving players a clearer breakdown of what they still need for quests, bosses, key items, map pieces, and other checks. # New and Expanded Location Support Several missing or previously untracked checks have been added to the randomizer. Newly supported checks include things like: ```Key Item: Radio Transmitter Key Item: Iris Key Item: Large Seed Key Item: Moon Blossom Key Item: Pads Blueprint: Rocket Launcher Additional cassette rewards Additional weapon crafting materials ``` Radio Transmitter is now properly treated as a Where Birds Lurk pickup and is required for the final progression path. Several cassette tapes that were previously bundled or missing from tracker logic are now represented as proper Archipelago checks. # Improved Logic and Progression Progression logic has been tightened across the world so the randomizer better matches what Laika can actually do. Notable logic updates include: ```Diplomacy now requires all three Pit Keys and the Mountainheart Card. A Caterpillar Made of Sadness now also requires the Mountainheart Card and all three Pit Keys. Clean Your Beak and Flute Cleaning Brush have stricter quest requirements. Radio Transmitter is now part of the late-game progression chain. Two-Beak God now requires the Radio Transmitter. Several cassette, key item, and quest checks were moved to more accurate requirements. ``` This should reduce cases where the tracker or server thinks something is in logic before the player can actually do it. # Better Quest Item Handling Quest items should behave more reliably when received from Archipelago. This update improves handling for AP-granted quest items that are later turned in to NPCs, including extra protection for quest chains involving: ```Iris Rainbow Pebble Birthday Invitation Jar Filled With Bugs Pads Moon Blossom Heartglaze Flower Jakob’s Ashes ``` The goal is to let vanilla quest logic still run correctly while preventing randomized quest items from being permanently lost, duplicated, or missed as checks. Heartglaze Flower still has special handling because the game expects the physical flower pickup to happen in a specific boss-room sequence. # Final Goal / Release Fix Goal completion should now be reported at the actual final ending sequence. Previously, defeating the final boss could send the location check, but the Archipelago game might not properly mark the slot as complete for release/goal purposes. v1.2 now reports completion during the final bomb/ending sequence, around the point where the credits are reached. This should fix cases where a player finished the game but the server did not release them. # Recent Activity and Hint Improvements The in-game Archipelago activity log has been improved. Hints should now display more cleanly, and duplicate bad hint messages like: `Item -1 at Location -1` should be suppressed when they come from tracker/text-client chat echoes. Item coloring has also been updated so newer key items, including Radio Transmitter, display with the correct category color. # Title Screen and Connection Polish The title screen Archipelago setup has received more polish. The AP connection panel, save-slot behavior, connection status text, DeathLink settings, Death Amnesty settings, and per-slot AP state handling have all been cleaned up. The mod now does a better job of binding AP settings to the correct save slot, reconnecting cleanly, and disconnecting when appropriate. # Weapon Mode and YAML Improvements The player YAML has been cleaned up to feel more release-ready and less prototype-like. Weapon Mode is now explained more clearly: ```direct: weapons are sent as complete weapons crafting: most weapons are split into blueprint + unique material ``` DeathLink and Death Amnesty options are also documented more clearly, including the Death Amnesty count range. The old “Coco” item name has also been cleaned up to the more player-friendly: `Ingredient: Coconut Milk` # Code Refactor and Stability Work A large internal cleanup was done on the C# mod and APWorld. The C# client was split into cleaner files for: ```Connection handling Packet handling Item grants Location checks DeathLink Universal Tracker Reconciliation Overlay display Title screen patches Quest patches Inventory patches Boss patches Cassette patches Map patches ``` The APWorld was also split and cleaned up with separate files for item pools, Universal Tracker setup, and logic explanations. This should make future fixes and features much easier to maintain. Phew! I believe that's everything? I'll try to make patches have less buffer in between to ensure the game has proper functionality after issues are discovered. There are still issues which are listed in the pins of the current issues on the Archipelago Discord. Please check there and ensure your issue isn't already reported. Otherwise, see you in the Wasteland! Please enjoy this new and improved patch!

entry.title: Here Comes Niko! v0.8.4
entry.content:
## Logic - Added 'Swim Course' to "Public Pool - Clint (Chatsanity)" - Added 'AC Repair' to "Bathhouse - Moomy" - Added Textbox requirement for "Tadpole HQ - Ledge Above Elevator" - Added Textbox requirement for `Goal: hired` - Added Textbox requirement for "Chatsanity - Pepper" (didn't have one because of region changes) - Added Textbox requirement for "Chatsanity - Dispatcher" (didn't have one because of region changes) - Added 'Parasol Repair' to "Achievement - Bottled Up" - Changed "Achievement - Frog Fan" region from Tadpole HQ to Home - Fixed a few locations not respecting rules when `progressive_contact_list: false` ## Installation 1. Double click the apworld or open ArchipelagoLauncher and `Install APWorld` 2. Open ArchipelagoLauncher 3. `Generate Template Options` to get the yaml or use the one under the release
## Playing 1. Setup your yaml and put it in `...\Archipelago\Players` 2. Click `Generate` on the ArchipelagoLauncher 3. `...\Archipelago\output` should have a AP_XXX.zip 4. Host locally via `Host` on the ArchipelagoLauncher OR Upload the zip to the [website](https://archipelago.gg/uploads) 5. Follow the Install instructions for the [Mod](https://github.com/niieli/NikoArchipelagoMod?tab=readme-ov-file#installation)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/niieli/Niko-Archipelago/compare/0.8.3...0.8.4

entry.title: Rabbit and Steel v0.3.2
entry.content:
fixed: * Fix route selection when kingdom order not used * Fix being able to go to other starting kingdom (there still is a cosmetic bug related to this where the stage name will be wrong if you load into the lobby under the wrong type and never correct it in the map) * Fix class sanity mouse clicks being able to go through * Fixed altair dagger typo * _ALL will now remove excluded classes automatically
# Changelog
All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/) and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).
## [v0.3.1](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/compare/v0.3.1-fix...v0.3.1) - 2026-05-23
## [v0.3.1-fix](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/compare/v0.3.0...v0.3.1-fix) - 2026-05-23
### Commits
- Fix route selection when kingdom order not used [`7d5a36e`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/7d5a36efdb43cd57b2b0a46e314128bf308dc3e3) - Fix being able to go to other starting kingdom [`1ae0615`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/1ae0615edafb64c16d3da2839d80597e19617853) - formatting [`b7cdca3`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/b7cdca31d29dfa0582784362c07f107a96d9d451) - Fix class sanity mouse clicks [`0d62569`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/0d625696cecefaf284a7009ff7264f54531487c9) - Removed formatter as there was github actions build errors [`de85a85`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/de85a856e0fe394b1afe0f2472565ee412665e41) - version update [`736b07b`](https://github.com/tjwombo/RNSArchipelago/commit/736b07b6d06dc15ce2bbc23281b2623e61a1c804)

entry.title: NSMBW v0.1.0
entry.content:
## New Super Mario Bros Wii v0.1.0 update - The Movement Update # Features - Movement update (beta) - Time (beta) - Inventory items (toad houses) - Location and item groups - Better saving feature - Glitched logic support - Reworked features to allow better support for other game versions. (US rev2 is still recommend but other should work with movement and time options disabled) - New docs - Support for external pop-tracker pack (pack doesn't exist yet)
Slight rework of setup, make sure you are in game, on the world map before connecting.
# Bugs fixed - Hint moves didn't unlock in game - Bowser unlock logic was reversed - More smaller ones - Did not work on Linux
# Credit - Thanks to react for creating all the logic for the movement feature.

entry.content:

entry.title: Metroid Fusion v1.22.2
entry.content:
## Changes
* PONR Checks should stop bugging when they are the only requirement in a connection, which was leading to unexpected checks being required (@NPCPotPie)
* Items from a Samus Returns world should now have sprites linked to their respective items (@lilDavid)
Setup guide link: [here](https://github.com/StalledStorm/ArchipelagoMine/wiki/Metroid-Fusion-Setup-Guide)

entry.title: CrossCode v0.8.5
entry.content:
## Changes to Mod
* Added information about the following options to the Archipelago Info Menu: (@CodeTriangle, #69) * **Shop Receive Mode** * **Progressive Equipment**
## Changes to Logic
* Moved **Grand Krys'kajo** to the end of Gaia's Garden rather than the beginning. (@CodeTriangle, #66) * Made the quest **Gaia Defeat** require **East Gaia Pass** in addition to its current requirements. (@CodeTriangle, #66) * Made the quest **Raising the Steaks** require access to **Autumn's Fall** in addition to its current requirements. (@CodeTriangle, #66) * Made the quest **The Observatory** require **Guild Pass** instead of **Mine Pass**. (@CodeTriangle, #66).
## Fixes to Mod
* Fixed an issue where, when connecting to a world after having previously been connected to another world in the same play session, all of the locations from the previous world would be sent to the next world. (@CodeTriangle, #70) * Fixed an issue where, when selecting New Game+ options, the begin game button was disabled by default (@CodeTriangle, #69) * Fixed an issue where, when entering a shop with **Shop Receive Mode** set to **None**, no shop slots would be purchaseable. (@CodeTriangle, #69)

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.0.post2
entry.content:
## Note
This release includes everything from 0.8.5 (@CodeTriangle)
## Fixes to Logic
* Changed the requirement of the quest **Salty Detox** from **Lakeside Escort** to **Rooting for Power**. (@CodeTriangle, #67) * Made **Beach Fight** require access to the first fight against Son of the East in Grand Krys'kajo. (@CodeTriangle, #67) * Added a requirement on **Azure Archipelago Pass** to: (@kumquat-ir, #62) * **Beach Fight** * **Trial of Ascension** * **Spiritual Drinks** * **Salty Detox** * **Wrath of Goat** * **In Cawhoofs** * **Riches with Fridges** * **Lost and On the Run** * **Trouble on the Highway** * **Tremors of the Past** * **Wetter Work**

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.0+pre.release.1
entry.content:
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**>>> This is an unstable pre-release. Unless you're testing, we recommend using version v1.2.1 instead. <<<**

entry.title: Reventure v0.20.0
entry.content:
THIS RELEASE IS PRE ALPHA. DO NOT USE IT OUTSIDE OF MULTIWORLDS SPECIFICALLY GENERATED TO TEST THIS. I'LL GET MAD IF YOU RUIN SOME MULTIWORLD WITH THIS BY ACCIDENT!
Alright folks, I sort of did it. The Graph Update kinda works. This means: - Random Spawns! - Random Item Locations! - Reduced starting jump height! - Many more things we could do now!
## How this works For various reasons (That I'd be happy to explain if anyone wants to know them), the only way I found to make the above possible, is by literally generating the logic based on randomized item locations. For this I built the [reventureregions](https://github.com/Droppel/reventurerust) tool. Given a YAML file, this tool then generates random spawn and item locations and then generates the corresponding logic. This logic is then appended to the yaml, allowing AP to create a valid world.
## Step by Step 1. Create your YAML, setting experimentalRegionGraph to true 2. Run the reventureregions tool to generate the logic for your slot (This takes ~1 minute on my PC) 3. The tool outputs the possible item locations (Due to the random item placement, some locations might be impossible). If this number is to low, you should remove the logic from your yaml and try again. Most of the time everything is possible. 4. Give your yaml to the host 5. The host needs to set reventure_options => allow_experimental to true in their host.yaml 6. Generate your world 7. Have fun
This build likely contains various issues (Broken logic, or other bugs) still please report any that happen! And if anyone wants to take a look at the rust code please do! I'd love to discuss any improvements.

entry.title: Pokemon Crystal v5.4.5
entry.content:
# Changelog
Since [5.4.4](https://github.com/gerbiljames/Archipelago-Crystal/releases/tag/5.4.4)
## Bug Fixes - Stop all player movement when triggering an event, preventing softlocks when an Ice Trap was active.
_This release is backwards compatible with seeds generated on 5.4.0 or later. Some fixes are retroactive, re-patch your ROM to benefit from them._

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.6
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.6
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Resident Evil 7 v0.4.0
entry.content:
# The bug fix version !
This releases changes a few things : 1. You don't get 40 millions copies of any items when you die ! Hooray, lets suffer together against Jacks ! 2. You now automatically skip to the chapter 2 if the option is enable ! Furthemore, no chapter 1 items locations are created !

entry.title: Hi-Fi RUSH v0.3.0
entry.content:
See [README](https://github.com/TRPG0/HbkArchipelago/blob/main/README.md) for install instructions.
Packaged with `zDEV-UE4SS_v3.0.1-947-g06474186`, `hibiki-bootstrap-v0.2.0`
- Added an in game message system, to be used to display messages when attempting to connect to a server, checking locations, receiving items from other players, and more. - VLogs can now be randomized. - Added an option to shuffle every store item except the Special Attack Slot Upgrade. - If there is only one player in the multiworld, player names will not be displayed in the store. - Chip upgrades will not show the item you can get if the upgrade isn't available to be purchased yet.

entry.title: Metroid Fusion v1.22.3
entry.content:
## Changes
* PONR Checks should be fixed (@NPCPotPie)
Setup guide link: [here](https://github.com/StalledStorm/ArchipelagoMine/wiki/Metroid-Fusion-Setup-Guide)

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.9
entry.content: pancage ## Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.9) ## Changes * Fixed Star World 5 level tile not being excluded from swapped exits when it should always be excluded * Fixed failed generations with transitions are off and teleports shuffle are on * Fixed rare cases where teleport/transition shuffle will map two entrances to the same exit * Enemy Shuffle updates * Larry's Castle second room no longer allows Pokeys, Green Boucing Koopas, Mega Moles or Dino Torches

entry.title: Baldur's Gate 3 v0.4.5
entry.content:
Fixes initialization issues and deathlink issues.
Note: This REQUIRES BG3 Mod 0.5.0.

entry.title: Tevi v0.7.1
entry.content:
## 1.5.1 fixes + Unicorn fixed + excluding all Traps fixed
## Changelog v1.4.8 -> 1.5.0
+ Traps -- Reverse Camera -- Yeet -- Double Time -- Low Jump Height -- Debuff -- Invisible Tevi
+ New Display option for Itempop ups + removed Money locations from pool when not needed + Automatic Hint system that display priority hints from AP + Quickdrops gain 1 additional charge when hitting + Disabled Keyboard / Gamepad inputs when a Textfield is selected in the Randomizer Menu + Fixed randomized background / music / bosses(?) + Quickdrop dmg changed to -> ( base dmg * MATK Pot ) + Chain -> removed potion scaling from Combo counter increased 1 dmg per chain hit + Quickdrop have a internal cooldown of 0.08s
### Logic
+ Removed CC Shop # 18 + Event location missing Logic + Teleporter Name display correctly + Ulskan Village Area to Plague Forest Exit -> logic fix + Hand exchange fixed + Item name fixed for Money blocks + DreamKeeper - Money Room X: 24 Y: 21 -> removed unreachable condition (Clusterbomb)
### ApWorld + Location and Item IDs are now hard coded and reduce to a lower number + Potions move to Client `Bonus Start` tab + Ensure that at least 16 potion each are available at all times, except rainbow bunny potion

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.0+pre.release.1b
entry.content: v2.0.0+pre-release-1a never existed trust

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v6.0.0.post2
entry.content: # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - **Fixed the issue with the events not working. Generation should always succeed now.** (Thank you @Seafo!) - Added Chapter 5 Items and Cards.

entry.title: Okami HD v0.4.5
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Add archipelago.json by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/62 * Fix Agata Logic Warp by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/64 * Fix Sasa Logic Warp * Rename Orbs for clarity by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/65 * Fix Shop locations creation when there's more than 1 shop per file by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/67 * Revert Shop Creation Fix by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/68 * Canine warriors and gale shrine access logic rework by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/74 * Rebalance junk fill weights * Set locations that don't give their randomized items and locations that cause softlocks to always give junk items * has_element_portable_source rule rework to take into account progressive weapons & secret techs.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.4.4...0.4.5

entry.title: Skyward Sword v0.5.6rc1
entry.content:
## v0.5.6 Pre-Release [Alpha]
This version is only compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater!!
Report any issues to the Skyward Sword channel under custom worlds in the AP discord server.
For setup instructions, visit [the SS AP Setup Guide](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/blob/ss/worlds/ss/docs/setup_en.md).
## What has changed? (v0.5.6) - Logic revamp, again! This one allows for full implementation of full entrance rando. The `all-entrances` option for entrance rando is disabled for the time being, but dungeon entrance rando is still available and uses the new entrance mapping ( by bcats - see [#48](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/48) ) - This will allow time for testing of the new entrance mapping while fixing final bugs with entrance rando before full release - New hints, including spirit of the sword, barren, path, and entrance hints, with several new distributions ( by bcats - also see [#48](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/48) ) - New hint options: precise item hints / precise hints / explicit hints - Breath link, an option like death link, but monkaStamina ( by YourAverageLink - see [#43](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/43) ) - Option to remove textboxes for minor items ( by YourAverageLink - see [#45](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/45) ) - Text colors in in-game text buffer ( by YourAverageLink - see [#39](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/39) ) - Console client fixes ( by YourAverageLink / lepelog - see [#44](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/44) and [#40](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/40) ) - Fix for hint inaccuracies during patching and unitest fixes ( by Harmjan387 - see [#47](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/47) ) - Fix for item link crash when patching ( by Connor308 - see [#35](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/35) ) - Logic fixes ( by Harmjan387 - see [#41](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/41) ) - Decreased default value for progression balancing from 70 to 65
## What has changed? (v0.5.5) - Logic revamp, no longer using eval() function, which brings us closer to core eligibility - Updated setup guide - new tutorial video by bcats - Fixed client connection bug regarding hints ( by Harmjan387 - see [#42](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/42) ) - Fixed logic bug regarding Eldin starting statues ( by bcats - see [this commit](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/commit/52d7a057c3b80d911d79de70e4e6d53681d65ff9) )
## What has changed? (v0.5.4) - WII CONSOLE SUPPORT! ( by YourAverageLink - see [#27](https://github.com/battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/27) ) - For more info, see [setting up your wii console](https://github.com/YourAverageLink/SSArchipelago/blob/console-socket/worlds/ss/docs/setup_en.md#setting-up-your-client-wii-console) in the SSAP Setup Guide - Fixed an issue with generation failure in AP 0.6.5 ( by Harmjan387 - see [#31](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/31) ) - Fixed an issue with the lumpy pumpkin chandelier send flag ( by Harmjan387 - see [#32](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/32) ) - Fixed an issue with death link on console ( by YourAverageLink - see [#34](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/34) ) - Added Goddess cube autotracking (by Harmjan387 and YourAverageLink - see [#33](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/33) ) - Added console auto-reconnect ( by YourAverageLink - see [#37](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/37) )
## What has changed? (v0.5.3) - Added a client command to toggle deathlink mid-game ( by Harmjan 387 - see [#29](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/29) ) - Fixed plando items breaking generation ( by Harmjan 387 - see [#29](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/29) )
## What has changed? (v0.5.2) - Several fixes for generation errors ( by Harmjan387 - see [#24](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/24), [#25](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/25), and [#26](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/26) ) - Completion condition fix ( by LelouBil - see [#22](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/22) ) - Shuffled Batreaux Counts ( by Battlecats59 - see [#19](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/19) ) - Options including vanilla (5-80), half (2-40), random (1-80), random-high (30-80), and random-low (1-50) - Batreaux check names are changed to contain the required amount of crystals. Kukiel will also appear in Batreaux's house, telling you what the shuffled crystal counts are. - Batreaux progression option is now a range 0-7, which will determine how many of Batreaux's rewards can possibly contain progression items. - If set to 0, no Batreaux rewards can contain progression items. - If set to 7, all Batreaux rewards could contain progression items. - If set to any number (n) between 0 and 7, then the first (n) rewards could contain progression items, and the highest rewards will not contain progression items. - Print client messages in-game ( by YourAverageLink - see [#21](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/21) ) - A cosmetic option has been added to the patcher to allow client messages in-game to be turned on or off before iso generation. - If turned on, client messages will be printed in-game in the bottom left corner of the screen. - Fix for incorrect hints ( by Harmjan387 - see [issue #22](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SS_APWorld/issues/22) and [PR #28](https://github.com/Battlecats59/SSArchipelago/pull/28) ) - Separate option for Lanayru Caves Small Key - moved away from dungeon small keys - New option has choices "Start With", "Caves", "Lanayru", and "Anywhere". All options will ensure that you will not be locked out of sand sea / lanayru desert / and so on, no matter where your starting statue or entrance is. - APWorld is now auto-generated by a github workflow, like the patcher build is. - Added an icon to the Skyward Sword client on the Archipelago launcher - Fix for APPlayerContainer issue in AP 0.6.2 - Update to AP 0.6.2
## What has changed? (v0.5.1) - Fixes for issues during seed generation: #20 - Logic fixes - Update to AP 0.6.1
## What has changed? (v0.5.0) - Logic has been rewritten to support entrance randomization. There will likely be logic bugs floating around, some may not have a significant impact while some may end your run. Hence, **use at your own risk!** - Random starting statues and random starting entrance options are now fully supported. - The itempool generation has been changed significantly, fixing several bugs regarding starting items and item placements. Although it is unlikely, there may be bugs that were created as a result. - Single crystals have been added as AP-recognized checks, however they will remain as single gratitude crystals for the time being. In the future, these checks may be randomized, for now they have been added to support single crystal logic. - Code has been cleaned up.
gl, hf! -bcats
### Downloads:
[RECOMMENDED] The zip file containing the apworld, YAML, and setup guides (ss_apworld-v0.5.5.zip) [RECOMMENDED] The patcher build (SS_APPatcher-v0.5.5.zip)
The apworld file (ss.apworld) The template YAML file (Skyward.Sword.yaml) *The above two files are contained in the first zip, and do not need to be downloaded if you download the apworld zip*

entry.title: Okami HD v0.5.0rc1
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Add City Checkpoint logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/54 * Add Ryoshima coast logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/55 * Add Sunken Ship Logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/69 * Add Imperial Palace Logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/73 * Add Seian city commoners logic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/59
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.4.5...0.5.0-preview-1

entry.title: Deltarune v2.0.0+pre.release.1c
entry.content: Fix Unlock chapter logic missing and chapter 2 start logic being wrong

entry.title: Old School Runescape v1
entry.content:
Adds Bingo Board * Optional as exclusive goal, or just added to the normal DS1 goal
Includes logic update v2.1.0 Plando will now force locations to exist if it can A few new cool UT features for OSRS (mostly bingo though)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/commits/osrs-bingo-RC1
